Flat concept inventory:
- Parameter-Tuning Paradigm Taxonomy | papers: 83bc360fa9874564cf8ccbd3a00e6e14dbe4e4e6; 5dbc2b2ee6e65e39fa3fc4bd5030be7a4a9f9a76; f26d0419a3e8e0d3128279c0a1c962a67f30b729; 9218965ff29c4747033c26098c598ee1e9bfa8e1; eb8e86d504084531691ff31d0fc23c82fbcee36c; 879c7942118b781645d183b05ba9a1b6986133fd; 82b5c48ef2fe6165e58d76e4ebbb42b0b95659fa; 3f40edfcafc018b2cb54612a9aaa9d6b43a11a26; bbb2fc6e95d24fb58ab6c25b216b14ac49a32fbe; 4f55797c559bfaae4597ba67550d5d38f09285a9; a07fead63ca30fcd708f66de173c70f40262817c; 20cc2537130651253ead98d7a7b4077af474d0e7; 79950179d60ba39a74d5fe2aedc47a57c0bf4c03; c1614ab718dad97018ee34fd57864bb58b6ecaba; 7efb1788b5e0fa3b4d9932722286ba1753b42f91; 983adfc42734a7ec2595a6b62352de967ab9000a; 3f413dca2607d68301143770e599b59d461a569e; f727986a460a33b9e62ac23f7d8901748e5c10c9; 7e17ef56273063dfa838de30b7cc0546b2e5ee10; 0c26024316c823e326bed05fd1611de365c0ebb3; ecc3415b74717b3f786760e12934a31b37d98312; 51ad726fdb12fce1f09bda7347bbf251d5ce971b; 53d8b356551a2361020a948f64454a6d599af69f; 84d96ad6389c03299b596b962fcc76412b7013db; 049ad4be9cdfd92f02c36f8fb056c5c7a98ff750; 1e983fccd65cbd39712fa360b92235e5497d81b6; 5ecc001af7dcfde1a9eb0b7e96ea4ea1fb9631e5; 2dc07d25a22467c01b6d5088ea148e58eb18cc2a; 6d994b4f5a46cd14e8f09f1e9e49120546b15e31; 0a6bc37a07a37e3573d36e10cc11669eca0ff903; a30f912f8c5e2a2bfb06351d4578e1ba3fa37896; 9ada8fa11b1cdece31f253acae50b62df8d5f823; 9a7b9515b66bf83c9c808626206eabe9a8837c22; 8554b7c4ec2466326f5bd55335082edd83183f94; - Understanding | papers: 83bc360fa9874564cf8ccbd3a00e6e14dbe4e4e6; 5dbc2b2ee6e65e39fa3fc4bd5030be7a4a9f9a76; f26d0419a3e8e0d3128279c0a1c962a67f30b729; 9218965ff29c4747033c26098c598ee1e9bfa8e1; eb8e86d504084531691ff31d0fc23c82fbcee36c; 879c7942118b781645d183b05ba9a1b6986133fd; 82b5c48ef2fe6165e58d76e4ebbb42b0b95659fa; 3f40edfcafc018b2cb54612a9aaa9d6b43a11a26; bbb2fc6e95d24fb58ab6c25b216b14ac49a32fbe; 4f55797c559bfaae4597ba67550d5d38f09285a9; a07fead63ca30fcd708f66de173c70f40262817c; 20cc2537130651253ead98d7a7b4077af474d0e7; 79950179d60ba39a74d5fe2aedc47a57c0bf4c03; c1614ab718dad97018ee34fd57864bb58b6ecaba; 7efb1788b5e0fa3b4d9932722286ba1753b42f91; 983adfc42734a7ec2595a6b62352de967ab9000a; 3f413dca2607d68301143770e599b59d461a569e; f727986a460a33b9e62ac23f7d8901748e5c10c9; 7e17ef56273063dfa838de30b7cc0546b2e5ee10; 0c26024316c823e326bed05fd1611de365c0ebb3; ecc3415b74717b3f786760e12934a31b37d98312

- Parameter-Frozen Paradigm Taxonomy | papers: d22e336171c7ac92167f9b03b0e660af922069b4; eaa70e42a10364ffe87e84656df435cd58fb430e; f84d6d6d58b836a64c4a96b062bfff769d08a595; c589ddc6c6fb07189af7c1212f6eb15c5ff72cde; 616597b6c8cc3d24339d9f16bb4b195624046abe; c4e4b72da211dbf2ab2fd5263d453cf22ee0cf44; a86dd6c62d3dc9c7989c98a3e4ace3fd8000e515; e9388e699a7ef4d12ae425e341ff610c67cbf64b; f4cba0db34aa0c389cec267ca1f3ba5255ea2645; 1fcffc771fdebb50682d3aad716b955ef0e72fe3; 034f1d77d832460a239072c81b5bb178b93c1e9f; 75ce9634d281cc12cbe434f86c737df8e10796fa; daf9e24adbba3d1aead91cbac26502d3043db069; 214fbadc57e954e325dc055fee5ac0e224dfde11; b645e706651391eca1f692e7f560051c21b3dea4; deb6dd39a68ea0d949f580a7944abf595185e150; 2dae1ad9b0c5cafc870ca2c300d639fa6047fb00; 0f5245e3a53f69f66b876173affe9309ee31e7d6; 8add69e155596bc128df70e1ddd5a41c68698399; e66f0f822d4c4853b39b27daaafa2993005fd55e; f58ca7ba4a08b7082e86b7a5989b4b0fda2107ab; e0f27336698c84709bd60b6b7f4ce588cbae66bf; e45036dddb5f27d3e87d2f14a2d9e6a402e7b5b7; 74acec7abaa6193107c6e3dfc630758ad9474af5; f53557c2d2a4c9b89b4d549bde6a512bc9aa8957; a994b90a982e622dfb473a9c7a51b1993f12f511; f534f566535f4e0fd2b72b1db3b18c47479e5092; 00a67af3b7dc785b4813b61d232cc76b4fb2b189; 5988806996e8d12f5d4aa911960d842cf7be0c24; ee9fc3765894c843e696e77a38ff7ecb0e76aa0d; 473eb062612a17c965eaa62136322f0dec6b1f8e; 58219d9826f9ddde448c73e7ecc690111f5698f4; a5cd606537a666e4807f1c9d342cfeb2b71c4a34; 6d928d835c31963ff32c5b5ec6e0dbd1cbadf2c9; - Understanding | papers: d22e336171c7ac92167f9b03b0e660af922069b4; eaa70e42a10364ffe87e84656df435cd58fb430e; f84d6d6d58b836a64c4a96b062bfff769d08a595; c589ddc6c6fb07189af7c1212f6eb15c5ff72cde; 616597b6c8cc3d24339d9f16bb4b195624046abe; c4e4b72da211dbf2ab2fd5263d453cf22ee0cf44; a86dd6c62d3dc9c7989c98a3e4ace3fd8000e515; e9388e699a7ef4d12ae425e341ff610c67cbf64b; f4cba0db34aa0c389cec267ca1f3ba5255ea2645; 3c55aa582a2d682eb53e9237589234854e0b92d8; e01c2a01d54365c8833b816de8ef39a752ffa9b0; 8a1a8290f7d42b0ce60445a4c0130ef737b3ff69; f8518829bfd945e7023646329e0836ffd7b0ed39; 3607b92705cd1fba04eaf295f57be4b085791063; 1fcffc771fdebb50682d3aad716b955ef0e72fe3; 034f1d77d832460a239072c81b5bb178b93c1e9f; 75ce9634d281cc12cbe434f86c737df8e10796fa; daf9e24adbba3d1aead91cbac26502d3043db069; 214fbadc57e954e325dc055fee5ac0e224dfde11; b645e706651391eca1f692e7f560051c21b3dea4; deb6dd39a68ea0d949f580a7944abf595185e150; 2dae1ad9b0c5cafc870ca2c300d639fa6047fb00; 0f5245e3a53f69f66b876173affe9309ee31e7d6; 8add69e155596bc128df70e1ddd5a41c68698399; 35534587ea9eae583dbca2de286d3ba22fec30d5; 8ce0d339896e658b124aee63532f085c55fee225; 2cbdd4ef5a14dbf3446e1d5b0ecf4b222ded820d; ec56f49bef8925dc8931cc261ab3aca4dd36ad2d; bc73bc1d7f63a33e686d0bb61f64b10ae31f1a69; e66f0f822d4c4853b39b27daaafa2993005fd55e; f58ca7ba4a08b7082e86b7a5989b4b0fda2107ab; e0f27336698c84709bd60b6b7f4ce588cbae66bf; e45036dddb5f27d3e87d2f14a2d9e6a402e7b5b7; 74acec7abaa6193107c6e3dfc630758ad9474af5; f53557c2d2a4c9b89b4d549bde6a512bc9aa8957; a994b90a982e622dfb473a9c7a51b1993f12f511; f534f566535f4e0fd2b72b1db3b18c47479e5092; 00a67af3b7dc785b4813b61d232cc76b4fb2b189; 5988806996e8d12f5d4aa911960d842cf7be0c24; ee9fc3765894c843e696e77a38ff7ecb0e76aa0d; 473eb062612a17c965eaa62136322f0dec6b1f8e; 58219d9826f9ddde448c73e7ecc690111f5698f4; a5cd606537a666e4807f1c9d342cfeb2b71c4a34

- Dialogue Understanding\\ | papers: 8a1a8290f7d42b0ce60445a4c0130ef737b3ff69; f8518829bfd945e7023646329e0836ffd7b0ed39; 3607b92705cd1fba04eaf295f57be4b085791063; 1fcffc771fdebb50682d3aad716b955ef0e72fe3; 034f1d77d832460a239072c81b5bb178b93c1e9f; 75ce9634d281cc12cbe434f86c737df8e10796fa; daf9e24adbba3d1aead91cbac26502d3043db069; 214fbadc57e954e325dc055fee5ac0e224dfde11; b645e706651391eca1f692e7f560051c21b3dea4; deb6dd39a68ea0d949f580a7944abf595185e150; 2dae1ad9b0c5cafc870ca2c300d639fa6047fb00; 0f5245e3a53f69f66b876173affe9309ee31e7d6; 8add69e155596bc128df70e1ddd5a41c68698399; 35534587ea9eae583dbca2de286d3ba22fec30d5; 8ce0d339896e658b124aee63532f085c55fee225; 2cbdd4ef5a14dbf3446e1d5b0ecf4b222ded820d; ec56f49bef8925dc8931cc261ab3aca4dd36ad2d; bc73bc1d7f63a33e686d0bb61f64b10ae31f1a69
- Table Understanding | papers: e66f0f822d4c4853b39b27daaafa2993005fd55e; f58ca7ba4a08b7082e86b7a5989b4b0fda2107ab; e0f27336698c84709bd60b6b7f4ce588cbae66bf; e45036dddb5f27d3e87d2f14a2d9e6a402e7b5b7; 74acec7abaa6193107c6e3dfc630758ad9474af5; f53557c2d2a4c9b89b4d549bde6a512bc9aa8957; a994b90a982e622dfb473a9c7a51b1993f12f511; f534f566535f4e0fd2b72b1db3b18c47479e5092; 00a67af3b7dc785b4813b61d232cc76b4fb2b189; 5988806996e8d12f5d4aa911960d842cf7be0c24; ee9fc3765894c843e696e77a38ff7ecb0e76aa0d; 473eb062612a17c965eaa62136322f0dec6b1f8e; 58219d9826f9ddde448c73e7ecc690111f5698f4; a5cd606537a666e4807f1c9d342cfeb2b71c4a34
- Generation | papers: 6d928d835c31963ff32c5b5ec6e0dbd1cbadf2c9; e6d7caa77eae7b64f78359669f4dd48fd2d177a1; 83851f1a32d41975582ca62355858ab5e34738f7; ee96922369a8ee1eb7bda1501520bb7916cde733; a4a41319d5805a29316f24ed9519f09db77d4c29; 1a01c982aa20c1a1ad1ad94866e3197da99a52a2; fb81264ac2fde6fecbdaaa2b96b9fa9e35bb2e08; 90e0a949da276b66d13920a185a6e35042337518; 1bf21dabbdfc81fd4f9e92b1201ecce744cabb6a; acbdbf49f9bc3f151b93d9ca9a06009f4f6eb269; 06ea568379211ffa07d9605f66f26f6f736ea5e0; 1f2a20a6efaf83214861dddae4a38a83ae18fe32; 3e4085e5869f1b7959707a1e1d7d273b6057eb4e; 2922768fd451ecdb45f48c1a83eb57f54a91221b; 454c8fef2957aa2fb13eb2c7a454393a2ee83805; 38115e80d805fb0fb8f090dc88ced4b24be07878; 0b0debb710366cdff461938c80763eace1651af6; f24dabf3317abaa3d7393ab7d48115f353749bde; 9af2b40a6d9edeb3d53d7e612018bdbff993ffd2; bc9f29881c1d93d225f0a74fa700531202c7043a; 97992c13baa6185c03d9e672f53185bc59822596; 281f8411654a8bbca3b15dd95fdba42e03d6d666; 3e664adb009dce373129a3563e4b2cb08731bc76; 9fec5cf2f06e6fd8c5e6f6028226082d1ecec5b7; 918b08a07d0578b600a624c9a120bebde7f47d5c; 6c1e1cc1e0e1f8fd026fe517607b2d4535565fa7; e7ad08848d5d7c5c47673ffe0da06af443643bda; 3e565c544a8639cc9c7568833e484d7610f5e5d4; 57e849d0de13ed5f91d086936296721d4ff75a75; 5f19ae1135a9500940978104ec15a5b8751bc7d2; 1b6e810ce0afd0dd093f789d2b2742d047e316d5; 90350aa626bed47b02d0c162462e5b0ca82be6b2
- Summarization | papers: 6d928d835c31963ff32c5b5ec6e0dbd1cbadf2c9; e6d7caa77eae7b64f78359669f4dd48fd2d177a1; 83851f1a32d41975582ca62355858ab5e34738f7; ee96922369a8ee1eb7bda1501520bb7916cde733; a4a41319d5805a29316f24ed9519f09db77d4c29; 1a01c982aa20c1a1ad1ad94866e3197da99a52a2; fb81264ac2fde6fecbdaaa2b96b9fa9e35bb2e08; 90e0a949da276b66d13920a185a6e35042337518
- Code Generation | papers: 1bf21dabbdfc81fd4f9e92b1201ecce744cabb6a; acbdbf49f9bc3f151b93d9ca9a06009f4f6eb269; 06ea568379211ffa07d9605f66f26f6f736ea5e0; 1f2a20a6efaf83214861dddae4a38a83ae18fe32; 3e4085e5869f1b7959707a1e1d7d273b6057eb4e; 2922768fd451ecdb45f48c1a83eb57f54a91221b; 454c8fef2957aa2fb13eb2c7a454393a2ee83805; 38115e80d805fb0fb8f090dc88ced4b24be07878; 0b0debb710366cdff461938c80763eace1651af6; f24dabf3317abaa3d7393ab7d48115f353749bde

- Mathematical Reasoning\\ | papers: 6c1e1cc1e0e1f8fd026fe517607b2d4535565fa7; e7ad08848d5d7c5c47673ffe0da06af443643bda; 3e565c544a8639cc9c7568833e484d7610f5e5d4; 57e849d0de13ed5f91d086936296721d4ff75a75; 5f19ae1135a9500940978104ec15a5b8751bc7d2; 1b6e810ce0afd0dd093f789d2b2742d047e316d5; 90350aa626bed47b02d0c162462e5b0ca82be6b2
